Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 18}When {f 4 2}'s level is {f 0 1 2}significantly higher{f 0 1 27} than the enemies' on the floor, {f 0 1 2}they will begin to flee{f 0 1 27} from him. This gives you the luxury of collecting treasure chests unhindered and exploring more efficiently.[n]{f 1 1}
